result.text: Scan: a touring band's van. Instruments: {n:5-9}. Merch boxes: {n:2-8}. Morale: running on gas-station coffee and belief. Request a song dedication, or scan their setlist?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

ded.text: Transmitting request... they've responded! They want a band name to dedicate it to. Quick, Captain — what are we?

name1.text: Dedication logged: 'This one goes out to The Improbables.' Somewhere on tonight's stage, we will be legends for four minutes.

name2.text: 'To the Heart of Gold, wherever she flies.' The band saluted. The van's blinker winked. Music and motoring, united.

setlist.text: Setlist acquired: {n:8-14} songs, one questionable cover, an encore they pretend is spontaneous. We know their secrets now. We will hum them.
